title: Choppy Wood
description: Improved planks, logs and other wood textures
body:
![Cover image featuring title, description, spruce slabs and stripped spruce log with an axe embedded into it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e78a85a04f4a303a0ee54deca0ff189184d24ba0.png)

## About
This pack updates textures for almost all wooden blocks in the game. It improves color and texture consistency, making blocks made from the same wood type look much more cohesive. The pack also supports several other resource packs, with the current compatibility list available down below.

## Features
- Updated hanging sign textures
- Updated boat textures
- Updated planks textures
- Updated log textures
- Updated shelf textures
- Improved color and texture consistency

## Compatibility
- [Fancy Fences](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-fences) by Zvezdov
- [Creaky Doors](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creaky-doors) by Zvezdov
- [Pixel Consistent Signs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-signs) by spiderbat
- [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild) by FrozenBlock
